description: Reader reads RM input sticks, compute tilizes then untilizes, writer writes RM output sticks. Identity passthrough.

approach: TensorAccessor for RM sticks, batch 32 sticks per block, push Wt pages per block into c_0
tilize c_0->c_1, then untilize c_1->c_16. Identity passthrough via tilize+untilize.
Wait Wt pages in c_16, extract 32 RM sticks per block, write via TensorAccessor to DRAM

change: Split single compute kernel into two KernelDescriptors for core_group_1 and core_group_2 with different nblocks_per_core compile-time args
reason: nblocks_per_core is compile-time and must differ between core groups to avoid processing wrong number of blocks on cliff cores

upstream_fixes: Split compute kernel into two KernelDescriptors for core_group_1/core_group_2

description: Compute adds reduce(SUM, REDUCE_ROW) with scaler 1/W. Reader adds reduce scaler generation. Output is reduced shape (B,C,H,32).

change: Separated input/output stick sizes and Wt. c_16 uses output_Wt, writer uses output_stick_size and output_Wt, reader uses input_stick_size
reason: Stage 2 output shape differs from input (reduced W=32 vs full W). Writer and c_16 must match output dimensions.

change: Changed output_shape[-1] to 32 for reduced width output
reason: Stage 2 reduce_mean outputs (B,C,H,32) - single tile width containing row means

approach: Added reduce scaler generation via prepare_reduce_scaler<c_2>(1.0f/W) before main loop
tilize c_0->c_1, reduce(SUM,REDUCE_ROW) c_1->c_3 with WaitAndPopPerTile, untilize<1> c_3->c_16. HW startup uses cb_reduce_scaler as srcB.

details: Mean values correct in Col0 but zeros in Col1-31. REDUCE_ROW output only fills Col0 of tile. Test expects mean broadcast across all 32 columns.

description: REDUCE_ROW output tile has valid data only in Col0 of each face. After untilize, only element[0] of each 32-element stick has the mean value, rest are zeros. Need to broadcast the mean across all 32 columns before untilize, or use a different approach.
evidence: Actual output shows mean in col0 (0.0206) and zeros in cols 1-31. Expected shows mean broadcast across all cols.

approach: Added zeros tile generation into c_24 via prepare_reduce_scaler(0.0f) for mean broadcast
After reduce, add<COL>(zeros_c24, mean_c3, c1) to broadcast Col0 mean across all columns, then untilize<1> c1->c16

change: Reader generates zeros tile in c_24. Compute uses add<COL>(c_24_zeros, c_3_mean, c_1) to broadcast mean from Col0 to all columns before untilize.

cb_summary: c0:Wt/Wt c1:Wt/Wt(reduce)+1/1(untilize) c2:1/persist c3:1/1 c24:1/persist(zeros) c16:1/1

upstream_fixes: separate input/output stick sizes and Wt in program descriptor

description: Center by subtracting mean: tilize -> reduce_mean (WaitUpfrontNoPop) -> sub<COL>(tilized, mean) -> untilize centered to output

approach: Changed reduce to WaitUpfrontNoPop so c_1 persists, added sub<COL>(c_1, c_3, c_4) with NoWaitNoPop/WaitAndPopPerTile, manual cb_pop_front(c_1, Wt), untilize c_4 (Wt wide) to c_16. Removed zeros tile broadcast from Stage 2.

change: Restored output_shape to full input shape (removed output_shape[-1]=32)
reason: Stage 3 outputs centered values at full width, not reduced width

approach: Removed zeros tile preparation (c_24) - no longer needed since Stage 3 uses sub<COL> directly instead of broadcast via add<COL> with zeros

summary: c_0: reader pushes Wt, tilize consumes Wt. c_1: tilize pushes Wt, reduce WaitUpfrontNoPop (persists), sub NoWaitNoPop, manual pop Wt. c_2: persistent scaler. c_3: reduce pushes 1, sub WaitAndPopPerTile COL broadcast pops 1. c_4: sub pushes Wt, untilize consumes Wt. c_16: untilize pushes Wt, writer waits+pops Wt. All balanced.

upstream_fixes: Restored output_shape to full input width in entry point
Removed zeros tile preparation from reader
